label: p10_d9_split_k_threshold_mode_sweep
hardware: local RX 7900 XTX / gfx1100 24 GiB card
command_shape: HIPENGINE_GGUF_ALLOW_UNSAFE_QWEN35MOE_FASTPATHS=1 HIPENGINE_GGUF_DECODE_REPACK=1 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt PYTHONPATH=. python3 scripts/qwen35_gguf_bench.py --model /models/gguf/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-UD-Q4_K_M.gguf --quant gguf_q4_k_m --decode-tokens 128 --warmup-runs 1 --measured-runs 2 --force-bulk-prefill --bulk-prefill-attention-mode bulk --use-wmma-prefill --use-gemv-decode --compiler-version-file /tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt --require-cached-build --prompt-length <PROMPT> --json <OUT>.json

sweep_results.label: 512_thr512
sweep_results.reason: Short-context split-K is faster in this two-run exploratory sample, but it changes the generated token stream versus the retained 512 row and needs a dedicated split-vs-context numerical fixture before lowering the default threshold.

sweep_results.label: 2048_thr1024
sweep_results.reason: Default split-K threshold is already beneficial at 2K.

sweep_results.label: 2048_nosplit
sweep_results.reason: Disabling split-K at 2K is 32.1% slower than the default split-K route.

sweep_results.label: 4096_warp
sweep_results.reason: Warp split is 2.2% slower than the retained grouped-GQA 4K row.

sweep_results.label: 4096_generic
sweep_results.reason: Generic split-K is 11.4% slower than the retained grouped-GQA 4K row.

next_actions: Keep the P10.D8 default threshold/mode as the retained configuration.
Do not lower the default threshold to 512 until a targeted split-K-vs-context numerical correctness fixture is added for short contexts.
Proceed to post-split-K rocprof to identify whether attention, selected GEMV, shared expert, or router/scatter is now dominant.
